nasb.text: Now the valley of Siddim was full of tar pits; and the kings of Sodom and Gomorrah fled, and they fell into them. But those who survived fled to the hill country.

esv.text: Now the Valley of Siddim was full of bitumen pits, and as the kings of Sodom and Gomorrah fled, some fell into them, and the rest fled to the hill country.

cnv.text: 西訂谷有許多漆坑。所多瑪王和蛾摩拉王逃跑的時候，都掉在坑裡，其餘的人都向著山上逃跑。

ccb.text: 西订谷有许多柏油坑，所多玛王和蛾摩拉王败走的时候，有些人掉进坑里，其他人都往山上逃命。

csbs.text: 西订谷有许多沥青坑；所多玛王和格摩拉王逃跑时，掉进坑里，其余的人都往山里逃跑。
